message:
feat(search): Add ANN search statistics and improve HNSW integration

Significant improvements to the approximate nearest neighbor search:

search/ann_index.rs:
- Add AnnSearchStats struct capturing detailed search metrics:
  - index_size, dimension, ef_search, k_requested/k_returned
  - search_time_us for performance profiling
  - estimated_recall formula based on ef/k ratio
  - is_approximate flag for distinguishing exact vs ANN searches
- Add search_with_stats() method returning both results and stats
- Import hnsw_rs::api::AnnT trait for proper interface access
- Handle edge cases (k=0, dimension mismatch) with proper stats

search/query.rs:
- Minor query parsing improvements

lib.rs:
- Wire up stats propagation to CLI output
- Improve --approximate flag handling

pages/bundle.rs:
- Add bundle export support for search statistics

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
